MODULE: cosmos.compatibility.model_invoker
FILE: cosmos/compatibility/model_invoker.py (683 lines)
CATEGORY: compatibility

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Model Invoker - Unified Model Calling Layer
=======================================================

Connects task routing to actual model invocation.

This is the bridge between:
- HermesAgent compatibility layer (tools/skills)
- Task routing (which model to use)
- Actual model APIs (Grok, G

CLASSES:
- ModelResponse: Response from a model invocation.
- ModelInvoker: Unified model invocation layer.

Handles:
- Model selection via task routing
- A
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def invoke(self, prompt: str, task_type: HermesAgentTaskType=None, tool: str=None, action: str
  Methods: async def invoke_for_tool(self, tool: str, action: str, prompt: str, context: Dict=None, **kwargs) -
  Methods: async def invoke_for_channel(self, channel_type: str, message: str, context: Dict=None, **kwargs) ->
  Methods: def get_available_models(self) -> List[str]
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_model_invoker() -> ModelInvoker
- async def invoke_model(prompt: str, task_type: HermesAgentTaskType=None, tool: str=None, action: str=None, **kwargs) -> 
- async def invoke_for_tool(tool: str, action: str, prompt: str, **kwargs) -> ModelResponse
- async def invoke_for_channel(channel_type: str, message: str, **kwargs) -> ModelResponse
